```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const yInput = Inputs.radio(
    [-1, 1],
    {
      value: 1,
      label: null,
      format: y => `y = ${y}`
    }
  );

  yInput.style.display = "flex";
  yInput.style.justifyContent = "center";
  yInput.style.gap = "12px";

  const zInput = Inputs.range(
    [-5, 5],
    {
      value: 0,
      step: 0.1,
      label: null
    }
  );

  const controls = html`<div style="
    width: 220px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 10px;
    justify-content: center;
  "></div>`;

  function compactRow(name, input) {
    input.style.width = "100%";
    input.style.margin = "0";

    return html`<div style="
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1.2rem 1fr;
      align-items: center;
      column-gap: 0.5rem;
    ">
      <span>${name}</span>
      ${input}
    </div>`;
  }

  controls.append(
    yInput,
    compactRow("z", zInput)
  );

  const plotHost = html`<div></div>`;

  function render() {
    const y = Number(yInput.value);
    const zSelected = Number(zInput.value);

    const z = d3.range(-5, 5.05, 0.05);
    const hinge = (z, y) => Math.max(0, -y * z);

    const data = z.map(d => ({ z: d, val: hinge(d, y) }));
    const lossAtZ = hinge(zSelected, y);

    const color = y === 1 ? "steelblue" : "tomato";

    const plot = Plot.plot({
      width: 500,
      height: 300,
      x: { label: "z", domain: [-5, 5] },
      y: { label:`max(0, -y z) = ${y === 1 ? "max(0, -z)" : "max(0, z)"}`, domain: [-0.1, 5.2] },
      marks: [
        Plot.line(data, {
          x: "z",
          y: "val",
          stroke: color,
          strokeWidth: 3
        }),
        Plot.ruleX([0], { strokeDasharray: "4,4" }),
        Plot.ruleY([0]),
        Plot.ruleX([zSelected], {
          stroke: "black",
          strokeDasharray: "2,2",
          strokeOpacity: 0.7
        }),
        Plot.dot(
          [{ z: zSelected, val: lossAtZ }],
          {
            x: "z",
            y: "val",
            fill: color,
            stroke: "black",
            r: 5
          }
        )
      ]
    });

    const wrapper = document.createElement("div");
    wrapper.style.display = "flex";
    wrapper.style.justifyContent = "center";
    wrapper.style.position = "relative";
    wrapper.style.margin = "1rem 0";

    const info = document.createElement("div");
    info.innerHTML = `
      <div><strong>y</strong> = ${y}</div>
      <div><strong>z</strong> = ${zSelected.toFixed(1)}</div>
      <div><strong>loss</strong> = ${lossAtZ.toFixed(2)}</div>
    `;

    info.style.cssText = `
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      background: white;
      border: 1px solid black;
      border-radius: 4px;
      padding: 8px 10px;
      font-size: 12px;
      text-align: center;
      opacity: 0.95;
    `;

    wrapper.appendChild(plot);
    wrapper.appendChild(info);

    plotHost.replaceChildren(wrapper);
  }

  yInput.addEventListener("input", render);
  zInput.addEventListener("input", render);
  render();

  const row = html`<div style="
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 24px;
    margin: 1rem 0;
  "></div>`;

  row.append(controls, plotHost);
  return row;
}
```
